title: output
description: One line written to *standard-output* or *error-output* during an evaluation. Lines are split on newlines; a trailing partial line is held in the wrapper's buffer until a finish-output or uninstall flushes it. eval_id is null for output emitted outside any eval.

mime.description: MIME type of the text payload. Always text/plain for now; reserved for future formats.

text.description: The line content, including the trailing newline when present.
